input: How do I show a progress bar to the operator from my agent?
expected: Skill activates and instructs to use emit_ui('progress', {label, value}) with value 0.0-1.0

input: I want the operator to approve a risky deployment before I proceed
expected: Skill activates and instructs to use emit_ui('approval_card', {title, detail, risk: 'high'})

input: Can I render HTML in the AG-UI dashboard from my agent?
expected: Skill activates and explains that no HTML sink exists — only structured JSON props via the 6 allow-listed components

input: What components can I emit with emit_ui?
expected: Skill activates and lists all 6: approval_card, choice_prompt, diff_summary, progress, metric, agent_card

input: How do I make my agent visible in the fleet dashboard?
expected: Skill activates and instructs to emit an agent_card with name, provider, and status props

input: My emit_ui call is failing with a ValueError
expected: Skill activates and explains likely causes: off-list component name, props > 8KB, or non-serializable props

input: How does the AG-UI run plane work?
expected: Skill activates and describes POST /agui/v1/run, lifecycle frames, and points to references/run-plane.md

input: What happens when I emit_ui on a server with the AG-UI surface disabled?
expected: Skill activates and explains graceful degradation: returns {ok: false} — treat as no-op, never fatal
